violations.text: The PIC Certified Food Safety Manager License that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection is currently expired. RIDOH CFP Food Safety Mangers License is to be reinstated (application provided at the time of inspection). New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The bleach/chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the sanitizer bucket was between 25-50 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of bleach/chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. More bleach was added to the sanitizer bucket and bleach solution was retested at 50-100 pm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

At the time of inspection, buckets used for storage of food items set for compost were observed stored on the same shelf and directly next to single use items (gloves, plastic wrap, etc.). Buckets for compost are to be stored in a way to prevent possible contamination of food, single-use items, and equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored inverted on a clean surface in the kitchen area. Single use Fry boats and tin foil pans are to be stored inverted or in their original protective packaging to prevent possible contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The following equipment in the kitchen area was not in good repair or properly adjusted... - The chest freezer in the back area was observed to have tape over the handle area - The salt shaker was observed to have tape covering half the shaker lid Tape is not considered a durable, smooth, easily cleanable surface. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment for use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris.... - The 4 door freezer gaskets and handles - The wire shelving to the rolling cart Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2024
